prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your first time parent forward
items: Schedule and attend a comprehensive preconception health appointment with your healthcare provider
Research and enroll in a comprehensive childbirth education class in your area
Create a comprehensive list of essential baby gear and research safety standards for each item
Interview and select a pediatrician for your baby before birth
Research and understand your health insurance coverage for pregnancy, delivery, and newborn care
Create a detailed emergency preparedness plan and pack a hospital bag for labor and delivery
